description.zh: 通过统一连接层在 Gmail、Slack、GitHub、Notion 等外部服务中执行真实操作。
description.en: Use a unified connection layer to take real actions across services such as Gmail, Slack, GitHub, and Notion.

review.zh: 把重复协作步骤整理成明确流程，适合提升团队执行一致性。
review.en: Structures recurring collaboration steps into a clear workflow for more consistent execution.

caution.zh: 连接外部服务或共享内容前，应核对接收方和数据范围。
caution.en: Confirm recipients and data scope before connecting services or sharing content.

prerequisites.zh: 需要明确的任务边界以及相关服务的访问权限。
